Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-21-2021 Continued To Jun-02-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mathew Hart appeared by zoom for Paul Taylor (Administrator).

The Court stated that it is waiting for a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Taylor apologized to the Court for missing the March 23rd hearing date, stated that he received the accounting information two weeks ago and that he is ready to prepare a petition on waiver of accounting. Mr. Taylor also stated that there are 34 Beneficiaries that he needs to communicate with, that it may take time and that the Beneficiaries have all been very cooperative. Status on close of estate is continued to June 2, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Taylor is to have either petition filed by May 26, 2021.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Carranza. Not reported.
